body_preview:
Joan,

The October on-call rota has been updated following the short-notice change last week. You are confirmed for the week commencing 12 October — full 24/7 hospital and community cover. Please acknowledge receipt and flag any conflicts by COB Friday.

Roisin
subject: On-call rota update — October

body_preview:
Hi Roisin,

Confirmed for the week of 12 October — no conflicts. I'll put the cover arrangements in place for my community caseload as usual. Is the sim-suite NRP refresher still going ahead on the 9th? I'd like to have that done before my on-call week starts.

Joan
subject: Re: On-call rota update — October

body_preview:
Team,

Please be advised that the HSE West Community Midwifery MDT meeting scheduled for Thursday 16 October has been moved to Tuesday 14 October at 10:00 in the UHG seminar room. Agenda items include postnatal home-visit pathway review, NRP recertification schedule, and Q4 staffing overview.

HSE West Midwifery Admin
subject: MDT meeting rescheduled — 14 October

body_preview:
Joan,

Following this morning's MDT, a summary of the agreed actions is attached. Your item — the postnatal home-visit day-5 rural gap — has been accepted for inclusion in the December Director's report. Fionnuala Walsh is leading; please coordinate with her on the evidence section by 28 November.

Roisin
subject: MDT action summary — 14 October

body_preview:
All midwifery staff,

HSE has updated the interim clinical guideline on neonatal resuscitation in line with the ILCOR 2025 recommendations. Key changes relate to the initial assessment protocol and the use of supplemental oxygen in the first 10 minutes. Please review the attached document and confirm reading by 31 October. CPD log update required.

HSE Clinical Governance
subject: UPDATED: Neonatal resuscitation interim guideline — action required

body_preview:
Joan,

The Birth Centre public consultation is confirmed for 10 October at Galway City Hall. You are listed as a presenting midwife. Final speaking slots are 10:30 and 11:15. Please send your slide deck to the organising committee by 5 October and arrive by 09:45 for AV checks.

HSE West Communications
subject: Community Birth Centre consultation — 10 October speaker confirmation

body_preview:
Joan,

This is to confirm your registration for the Advanced Neonatal Resuscitation Programme practical recertification scheduled for 14 January 2027 in the UHG Simulation Suite. Preparation materials will be circulated in December. Please ensure you complete the online theory module at least two weeks in advance.

UHG Clinical Training
subject: NRP recertification booking confirmed — 14 January 2027

body_preview:
Dear Joan,

Your annual leave request for 19–20 December 2026 has been approved subject to clinical cover being in place. Please ensure handover notes are submitted to your line manager by 17 December. Your leave balance following this period will be updated in the HR system within 5 working days.

HSE HR Services
subject: Annual leave approved — 19–20 December 2026

body_preview:
Joan,

As discussed at MDT, the community postnatal home-visit pathway pilot is progressing to the Director's report phase. I've drafted the data section and flagged the rural day-5 gap as the primary finding. I'd appreciate your sign-off on the operational commentary before I submit the draft. Can you review by Tuesday?

Fionnuala
subject: Postnatal pathway report — operational commentary review

body_preview:
Team,

Please note that the HSE West Community Midwifery roster for November and December has been finalised. Individual schedules have been distributed. If you have any conflicts or amendments to request, please contact your line manager within 5 working days. On-call preferences for the Christmas period must be submitted by 7 November.

HSE West Midwifery Admin
subject: Nov–Dec roster finalised — on-call Christmas preferences by 7 Nov

body_preview:
Joan,

I'm writing on behalf of the INMO Western Branch to confirm your abstract submission for the 2027 annual midwifery conference has been accepted. Your presentation slot is provisionally set for 20 March 2027, morning session. Further details on format and timing will follow in January. Congratulations on the acceptance.

INMO Western Branch
subject: Abstract accepted — INMO Western Branch midwifery conference 2027

body_preview:
Joan,

The HSE West Birth Centre Working Group has scheduled a full-day strategy session for 30 January 2027 at Galway City Hall. Your attendance is requested. The agenda will include review of the October consultation outcomes, evidence synthesis from the City Hall event, and planning for the formal HSE submission. Please confirm attendance by 15 November.

HSE West Birth Centre Steering Group
from_name: HSE West Birth Centre Steering Group
subject: Birth Centre Working Group strategy day — 30 January 2027

body_preview:
Joan,

Confirmation of your place on the NUIG Masters in Midwifery Practice Module 4 intensive, commencing 5 March 2027. The two-day research methodology workshop in Dublin is scheduled for 5–7 February 2027 as part of your pre-module preparation. Please arrange travel and accommodation independently and retain receipts for the CPD expense claim.

NUIG School of Nursing and Midwifery
from_name: NUIG School of Nursing and Midwifery
subject: Masters Module 4 confirmation — workshop 5–7 Feb 2027

body_preview:
Joan,

Following your meeting with Dr. Carey regarding the birth centre evidence map, I wanted to pass on that the Maternity Strategy Implementation team has requested a brief on community birth outcomes from the Galway area for inclusion in the national report. This would complement your City Hall presentation well. Are you in a position to contribute a section? Deadline is late November.

HSE West Clinical Lead
subject: National maternity strategy report — community birth outcomes section

body_preview:
Joan,

Just a reminder that your mandatory infection prevention and control refresher is due before the end of Q4. The next available session is 3 November at 14:00 in the Education Centre. Please book your place via the HSELand portal. Completion is required for the CPD portfolio and annual appraisal.

HSE Infection Prevention
subject: Reminder: IPC refresher due Q4 — next session 3 November

body_preview:
Joan,

The peer review of your postnatal pathway evidence summary has been completed by Dr. Deirdre Moran and Siobhan Flannery. Both reviewers have commended the clarity of the rural day-5 gap analysis. Minor suggested edits are attached. Please incorporate and resubmit to Fionnuala Walsh by end of day Friday.

HSE West Quality & Patient Safety
subject: Peer review complete — postnatal pathway evidence summary

body_preview:
Joan,

We are writing to confirm that your request to join the HSE West Birth Centre Steering Committee has been approved. Your first meeting as a committee member will take place on 30 January 2027 in Galway City Hall. A terms of reference document and committee membership list will be circulated in advance. Welcome to the committee.

HSE West Birth Centre Steering Group
from_name: HSE West Birth Centre Steering Group
subject: Welcome to the Birth Centre Steering Committee

body_preview:
Joan,

Your HSE annual appraisal has been scheduled for Tuesday 28 October at 11:00 with Dr. Roisin Carey. Please complete the self-assessment form on the HSELand portal before the meeting. Key areas to cover: CPD log for the year, clinical competency updates, and objectives for 2027. Let me know if the time does not suit.

HSE Galway Midwifery Admin
subject: Annual appraisal scheduled — 28 October with Dr. Carey
